name: temperature-field
title: Temperature Field
description: Temperature entry with °C/°F toggle and an advisory hypothermia–fever band.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with the canonical °C value (null when cleared).

props.name: label
props.description: Field label; pass null to omit when a parent supplies the heading.

props.name: site
props.description: Measurement site shown alongside the band.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input and unit toggle.

clinicalNotes: Fever thresholds depend on measurement site (oral vs core vs axillary) and age, so the band is advisory only and the site is displayed beside it — a "38.0" means different things rectally vs axillary. Values convert on unit switch and are stored to one decimal place; output is always canonical °C. The band never blocks entry.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes field + input + toggle-group. Band feedback is inline (no round-1 temperature preview exists).
